title: MACHINE LEARNING FRAMEWORK TO DETECT AND MONITOR COMPLIANCE MATTERS
summary:
System apparatus, article of manufacture, method and/or computer program embodiments are provided for detecting and monitoring compliance matters. An example method may include obtaining a first set of image data corresponding to an environment from one or more image sensors; processing the first set of image data using a first machine learning algorithm to yield annotated image data that identifies at least one object within the environment; processing the annotated image data using a second machine learning algorithm to determine one or more attributes associated with the at least one object within the environment; and generating, based on the one or more attributes, an evidence package corresponding to the at least one object within the environment, the evidence package being configured to facilitate a determination of one or more action items associated with the at least one object.

AMENDMENT TO THE CLAIMS:
1
1. (Currently Amended) A computer-implemented method comprising:obtaining, from one or more image sensors, a first set of image data corresponding to an environment;
processing the first set of image data using a first machine learning algorithm to yield annotated image data that identifies at least one object within the environment;
processing the annotated image data using a second machine learning algorithm to determine one or more attributes associated with the at least one object within the environment;

[[and]] generating, based on the one or more attributes, an evidence package corresponding to the at least one object within the environment, the evidence package being configured to facilitate a determination of one or more action items associated with the at least one object[[.fl;
obtaining
, from one or more imag
e sensors, a second set of imag
e data corresponding to the environment;

processing the second set of imag
e data to identify a change in the one or more attributes associated with the at least one object within the environment;
 and
determining, based on the chang
e in the one or more attributes, that the one or more action items associated with the at least one object are complete.

Currently amended

2
2. (Original) The computer-implemented method of claim 1, 
further comprising:providing the evidence package to a computing system, the computing system implementing one or more operations to determine the one or more action items based on the evidence package.

Original

3
3. (Cancelled).
Canceled

4
4. (Original) The computer-implemented method of claim 1, 
further comprising:capturing the first set of image data in response to a trigger condition.

Original

5
5. (Original) The computer-implemented method of claim 1, 
wherein the evidence package corresponds to at least one of a safety compliance matter, a regulatory compliance matter, a service

compliance matter, a traffic compliance matter, a permit compliance matter, and a community compliance matter.
Original

6
6. (Original) The computer-implemented method of claim 1, 
wherein the first machine learning algorithm corresponds to an object detection model and the second machine learning algorithm corresponds to a vision language model (VLM).
Original

7
7. (Currently Amended) The computer-implemented method of claim 6, 
wherein the second machine learning processes algorithm the annotated image data to determine the one or more attributes based on domain relevant data stored in [[the ]]one or more contextual knowledge databases.
Currently amended

8. (Original) The computer-implemented method of claim 1, 
further comprising:sending the first set of image data from an edge device to a cloud server, wherein the cloud server is configured to implement at least one of the first machine learning algorithm and the second machine learning algorithm.

Original

9. (Original) The computer-implemented method of claim 1, 
further comprising:sending the evidence package to a third-party system corresponding to an entity that is responsible for addressing the one or more action items.

Original
